info.title: AlienVault OTX API
info.description: LevelBlue Open Threat Exchange (OTX) DirectConnect API. Provides access to threat intelligence pulses, indicators of compromise (IOCs), and community-shared threat data.

tags.name: Indicators
tags.description: IOC lookup and file/URL submission endpoints
